name: Seafood Casserole
recipeIngredient: A Few Drops of Tabasco Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Sauté green onions in butter until softened.
2. Add flour and milk, stirring constantly until smooth.
3. Season with salt, pepper, cayenne pepper, Worcestershire sauce, and a few drops of Tabasco sauce.
4. Gradually stir in grated cheese, shrimp, crabmeat, and chopped eggs into the sauce.
5. In a separate bowl, mix remaining grated cheese with chopped pecans and half cup of stuffing mix.
6. Arrange fish mixture in casserole dish.
7. Sprinkle crumb mixture over the fish mixture.
8. Sprinkle remaining crumbs on top.
9. Bake at 375°F for 20 to 30 minutes.
Serves 6
